chunks.title: Adversaries and Initial Obstacles
chunks.reason: Describes the initial attempt by adversaries to join the building effort and their subsequent discouragement of the work under Cyrus and Darius.

chunks.title: Accusations Under Ahasuerus and Artaxerxes
chunks.reason: Summarizes written accusations against Judah during the reigns of Ahasuerus and Artaxerxes.

chunks.title: Letter from Rehum and Shimshai
chunks.reason: Contains the full text of the letter sent to King Artaxerxes detailing the history and potential threat of the Jews rebuilding Jerusalem.

chunks.title: King Artaxerxes' Decree
chunks.reason: Records the king's response, his findings from the records, and his command to halt the rebuilding.

chunks.title: Work Halted Until Darius
chunks.reason: Describes the immediate enforcement of the decree and the cessation of work until the second year of Darius.
